<!-- High-level description of what you'd build. -->

## Impact
- Who benefits: <!-- e.g. all users, just journalists, just California voters -->
- Estimated effort: <!-- small / medium / large, or hours if you can guess -->
- Dependencies: <!-- new data sources, schema changes, vendors, etc. -->

## Nonpartisanship check
